title: Helmets to Crowns
description: A Minecraft Resource Pack that replaces helmets with custom textured crowns which can be customized further with Armor Trims.
body:
A Resource Pack that replaces the traditional Vanilla Helmets with Custom Crowns while still keeping Vanilla Style. For every crown there are multiple Armor Trims that create gems on the crown of which the color is completely customizable. The fitting Armor Trims change depending on the pack version you choose (described below or in "README.txt" in the pack).

## Netherite Crown
![Netherite Crown with Silence Armor Trim + Redstone ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4aae58b63906dbabe7a80059f31d4a880f87140.jpeg)
The Netherite Crown can be customized using one of the _Deep Dark Armor Trims_ (Silence & Ward).

## Diamond Crown
![Diamond Crown with Flow Armor Trim + Redstone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b70102f6899b84f817365ee70a2e4ec1dd9acdf6.jpeg)
The Diamond Crown can be customized using one of the _Trial Chambers Armor Trims_ (Flow & Bolt)(Pack Version 1.0.x) or using one of the _Trail Ruins Armor Trims_ (Host, Shaper, Raiser & Wayfinder)(Pack Version 2.0.x).

## Golden Crown
![Golden Crown with Dune Armor Trim + Redstone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae65218aa3120af4f7569b717aa3eda70f521b05.jpeg)
The Golden Crown can be customized using one of the _Exploring Armor Trims_ (Dune, Coast, Wild & Tide).

## Iron Crown
![Iron Crown with Sentry Armor Trim + Redstone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c4ad8cba1f318539b27bd587e904e557647d49b.jpeg)
The Iron Crown can be customized using one of the _Pillager Armor Trims_ (Sentry & Vex).

## Copper Crown
![Copper Crown with Host Armor Trim + Diamond](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9452b9ec2ee7ac8d61aa3cbb032fcaa23d04348.jpeg)
The Copper Crown can be customized using one of the _Trail Ruins Armor Trims_ (Host, Shaper, Raiser & Wayfinder)(Pack Version 1.0.x only).

## Chainmail Crown
![Chainmail Crown with Spire Armor Trim + Amethyst](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1cce62f93ed3c7d2f89ee29cd9ab6a7399d92c0d.jpeg)
The Chainmail Crown can be customized using one of the _End Armor Trims_ (Spire & Eye).

## Leather Laurel Wreath
![Leather Laurel Wreath with Rib Armor Trim + Gold](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3beb1d084df9e4e064e509c56d93e7919aee6ef9.jpeg)
The Leather Laurel Wreath can be customized using one of the Nether Armor Trims (Rib & Snout).
IMPORTANT!
In this case the Trim replaces the whole armor piece so you can freely choose the color of the wreath.
